case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JINHUEY H TSENG AKA JINHUEY TSENG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JINHUEY H TSENG AKA JINHUEY TSENG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-15-2014
CRC 3.740 REVIEW - DISMISSAL-ENTIRE ACTION ON FILE.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100047128) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. HOWEVER, THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER THE PARTIES TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT UNTIL PERFORMANCE IN FULL OF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6(TRANSACTION ID # 56575793)
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100047128) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT JINHUEY H TSENG AKA JINHUEY TSENG
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS AND IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100047128) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED MAR-28-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JINHUEY H TSENG AKA JINHUEY TSENG
